series_metadata.series_title: MT - Examination Reports and Related Correspondence
series_metadata.series_description: Reports of examination contain information of records and affairs of each money transmitter including assessments of safety and soundness and compliance with applicable laws assembled by Division examiners. This category includes correspondence related to the examination from the Division to the money transmitter and correspondence related to the examination received from the money transmitter. This category does not include the examiners work papers.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for twenty (20) years from date of examination report, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
